policy.2d_orthographic_target: Primary candidates for drawing-to-CAD training and evaluation.
policy.3d_pmi_reference: Model-based/isometric PMI views; useful for GD&T/callout recognition but excluded from 2D reconstruction training.
policy.2d_reference: 2D diagrams, symbol sheets, and small drawing references; useful for symbol/callout augmentation.
